source: tests/testthat/test-docx-to-qmd.R:2387-2398 (build_figure_field_code_docx(): payload_fields <- list(type="figure", id=fig_id, version=2L); if (!is.null(original_path)) payload_fields$original_path <- original_path) and :2480-2486 (test 'figure field code restores original_path on re-harvest (#79)', literal values fig_id="fig-consort-flow", orig="figures/fig-consort-flow.png"), combined verbatim -- the legacy writer's v2 figure field-code shape.
